contracts_touched.description: v1.5: static extraction of contracts + selectors the strategy will touch (regex-derived, cached at register time). Shape: `{ "0xCONTRACT": ["selector", ...], "_extraction": "complete"|"incomplete", "_warnings": [...] }`.

deleted_at.description: Surfaced when the existing row is soft-deleted (Pitfall 9).

policy_alignment.description: v1.5: derived alignment between contracts_touched and the active policy. Verdict ∈ satisfied | partial | missing | incomplete. Always recomputed against the live policy — not cached.
